title: S.O.M
description:
[STORY OF MINECRAFT]

Makes things more vibrant&lore-accurate.
body:
[![ᛝᛋᛏᛟᚱᛇᛜᛟᚠᛜᛗᛁᚾᛖᚴᚱᚨᚠᛏᛝ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61fb98f33d9f82e8c34e798842c16f5a8d13e3c2.png)](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:HerobrineInAlpha.jpg)

__________________________

> # Description
> ### ᛜ

**_"Makes Things more Vibrant, lore-accurate, and Artistically Consistent". "Things may change depending on the lore accuracy of the in universe Legends, Dungeons, Dungeons II games._**

**_(The purpose of this pack is to make the game more asteticaly consistent and to merge all the best aspects of "Minecraft" as a whole togeather like one cohesive universe where everything matters older versions, modern versions, spinoffs, mob vote, losers, biome vote losers, treating herobrine and the default skins as if there characters that exist in the lore. Many of the textures are a sort of merge of the programmer art textures and the modern textures. every aspect matters in some way.)_**

**This Resourcepack makes the grass and foliage colormap more vibrant to better match the very vibrant water and resemble the ALPHA & BETA Minecraft colors, kinda looks like the lego minecraft sets color palette too.**

**A lot of the item textures are more artistically consistent with Minecraft's art style, more square, and the textures match what they're supposed to represent better.**

**Some 3D items are now 2D sprites to be more consistent with the items that are already 2D.**

**All the food has animations when eaten, only works on 1.21.4+.**

**The UIs are reworked to all be unique a couple of them won't work without /OptiGUI Mod.**

**The effect icons are changed.**

**Many of the mob textures are changed either to be more lore accurate, consistent, or simply to look _"better in my opinion, of course"._ Some have emissive textures that didn't before w/ETF&EMF Mods.**

**Furnace, Torch, XP Bottle, Eye of Ender, and Crying Obsidian are animated.**

**Cactuses "Cacti" have Arms, Dripstone, Mushrooms, & the Mace are 3D.**

**Leaf blocks are Dungeons style bushy.**

**There's some special clouds you might see every once in awhile "other than the creeper one".**

**All the blocks that canonically should glow are now emmisive w/Continuity Mod.**

**The Ominous blocks, items, and effects are retextured with white eyes to resemble HIM.**

**All the weapons, tools, and armor have unique textures & shapes from each other instead of all being the same just with different colors.**

- **_If you don't like certain features get the Respackopts Mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts] I made some things togglable. If theres any other things you think I should make togglable tell me on Github [https://github.com/STEVE-IDK/Issues/issues] and chances are there's an alt texture for something you don't like in the alternate stuff folder in the assets folder of the pack._**
__________________________

__________________________
_**"This Resourcepack is not affiliated with any of these Mods".**_ Compatible, meaning this resourcepack has files within it that have my own textures and models that override and change things featured in these Mods to make them more Compatible and consistent with the style of this resourcepack, such as,


   ### **[Examples]**
**Friends&Foes**| 
The Rascal Mob, The Wildfire Mob

**Subtle Effects**|
The Water&Lava Splash Effects

**Falling Leaves**|
Made the Spruce Leaf have its own texture "Just make sure the confier setting is above 0"

**Cherished Worlds**|
Made the Star an unlit and lit Redstone torch




So things won't be inconsistent or out of place if you have these Mods installed and this resourcepack applied. 
You do [**NOT**] need any of these Mods for this resourcepack to work, but they are great Mods that I use often myself, that's why this resourcepack is compatible with them.

<details>
<summary>💧Satisfying Mods</summary>
